metadata.description: A minimal MCP server exposing three utility tools for AI agents: add two numbers, retrieve the current UTC datetime, and echo a string back unchanged.

plugins.name: simple-mcp-server
plugins.description: Three lightweight MCP tools for agent use: add (sum two numbers), get_datetime (current ISO 8601 UTC timestamp), and echo (round-trip string verification). Ideal as a starter server, connectivity health-check, or reference implementation.
